title: turnera oculata var. oculata
intro: Turnera oculata var. oculata, also known as yellow ginseng or ojo de buey, is a plant species in the family Passifloraceae. It is traditionally used as an adaptogen, boasting medicinal properties that aid in reducing inflammation and improving mental clarity. The plant's health benefits include reducing stress, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, making it a sought-after remedy in herbal medicine. Turnera oculata var. oculata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for various herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
